Hero.subtitle: From first idea to final production, work with verified partners wherever you need them — all managed in one place.

Platform.title: How FashionsDen works
Platform.subtitle: From first idea to final production, manage every step with the right partners, clear communication, and full visibility.

0.title: Start Your Project
0.desc: Whether you have a full tech pack or just an idea, you can get started. Upload your designs, reference photos or simply describe what you want to create — and we'll connect you with the right partners to bring it to life.

1.desc: Explore verified designers, sample makers and manufacturers by category, capabilities, MOQ, lead times and location.

2.title: Review sample and confirm production

3.title: Track everything in one place
3.desc: Monitor progress, approvals, updates and deliveries from a shared workflow for brands and production partners.

Testimonials.title: Results from brands and manufacturers
Testimonials.subtitle: Fashion teams producing with more speed, control and predictability.

0.name: Valeria Ruiz
0.quote: We went from producing across three separate chats to managing everything in one flow. Today we launch collections with fewer delays and better quality control.

1.name: Andrés Peña
1.quote: We found a manufacturer for activewear with real experience in technical fabrics. The sample process was much faster.

2.name: Paola Medina
2.quote: Milestone tracking helped us detect bottlenecks before they affected the season delivery date.

3.name: Textiles Rivera
3.quote: We now receive better defined briefs and orders with more technical context. That allowed us to improve response times and close rate.

4.name: Confecciones Delta
4.quote: We connected with brands that are actually ready to produce. Less unproductive negotiation, more concrete orders.

5.name: Samuel Ortiz
5.quote: Per-order messaging and change history save us hours every week. The team operates with better clarity.

About.title: About Us
About.intro: FashionsDen is a global platform designed to support fashion brands at every stage of their journey — from idea to execution, and beyond.
About.intro2: We bring together everything needed to build and scale a brand in one place: design, tech packs, sourcing, manufacturing, branding, content creation, and growth.
About.intro3: Instead of navigating a fragmented industry with multiple suppliers, freelancers, and production partners, FashionsDen gives you a single, connected ecosystem where everything works together.
About.intro4: Whether you're starting with just an idea or managing a growing brand, we provide the tools, network, and infrastructure to move forward with clarity and speed.
About.intro5: Our mission is to simplify the fashion industry — making it more accessible, efficient, and scalable for brands worldwide.
About.intro6: Because building a fashion brand shouldn't require managing chaos.
About.missionText: Our mission is to remove the complexity of building a fashion brand. Connecting every stage of the process into one seamless platform.

0.title: Sustainability
0.desc: We believe in a future where fashion and the environment coexist in harmony

1.title: Transparency
1.desc: We promote transparency throughout the supply chain

2.title: Collaboration
2.desc: We connect brands and manufacturers to create lasting relationships

3.title: Innovation
3.desc: We use technology to simplify complex processes

About.ctaTitle: Ready to build, launch, and scale your fashion brand?

ForBrands.heroSubtitle: Source effectively and produce more sustainably.
ForBrands.platformText1: You're ready to produce your fashion locally and sustainably — great! But right now, finding the perfect European manufacturer for your product can be a real hassle. You may have been browsing the internet, visiting trade shows, or even diving into social media. But those methods can eat up your time, drain your wallet, and in the worst case, lead you to a disappointing manufacturer.
ForBrands.platformText2: That's where we come in: introducing FashionsDen, Europe's first sustainable sourcing platform. Forget the headaches and welcome a super simple way to find what you need!
ForBrands.howItWorksSubtitle: Watch your idea come to life in a few simple steps.

0.title: Start Your Project
0.desc: Whether you have a full tech pack or just an idea, you can get started. Upload your designs, reference photos or simply describe what you want to create — and we'll connect you with the right partners to bring it to life.

1.title: Chat And Compare
1.desc: Negotiate in your own language using our real-time translated chat.

2.title: Start Production
2.desc: Order your collection using our secure ordering and payment tools.

0.title: Trusted Manufacturers
0.desc: Get access to reliable manufacturers in Europe for your sustainable fashion project, significantly reducing your sourcing costs and simplifying the procurement process.

1.title: Less Hassle, More Matches
1.desc: Upload your project and let qualified manufacturers come to you, saving time on endless searches and having the option to explore the network yourself.

2.title: Guidance Built For You
2.desc: Receive personalized guidance from our team through the platform chat. Once inside, we'll be here to address your specific needs and help you bring your project to life.

ForBrands.ctaTitle: Start An Effortless Journey Towards A More Conscious Fashion World

ForManufacturers.heroTitle: Find New Leads And Grow Your Business
ForManufacturers.heroSubtitle: Get visible to brands across Europe.
ForManufacturers.platformTitle: The Future of Fashion Starts Here
ForManufacturers.platformText1: You didn't start your brand to manage endless suppliers, chase contacts, or piece together production across multiple platforms.
ForManufacturers.platformText2: But that's exactly what the fashion industry forces you to do. FashionsDen changes that. We bring every stage of building a fashion brand into one place — from design and development to sourcing, manufacturing, and beyond. No more fragmentation. No more guesswork. No more wasted time. Just one platform to build, launch, and scale your brand with clarity and control.
ForManufacturers.howItWorksSubtitle: Help your next client in a few simple steps.

0.title: Start Your Project
0.desc: Whether you have a full tech pack or just an idea, you can get started. Upload your designs, reference photos or simply describe what you want to create — and we'll connect you with the right partners to bring it to life.

1.title: Chat And Negotiate
1.desc: Negotiate in your own language using our real-time translated chat.

2.title: Start Production
2.desc: Close a deal and start producing for your newly found lead.

0.title: Fair Pricing. Built on Real Value.
0.desc: Building a fashion brand shouldn't mean choosing between cost, quality, and reliability. FashionsDen connects you with trusted partners who deliver consistent results — with transparent pricing and clear expectations from the start. No hidden costs. No miscommunication. No compromises on quality. Because real value isn't about the lowest price — it's about getting it right the first time.

1.title: Work Without Language Barriers
1.desc: Collaborate seamlessly with partners, suppliers, and clients — no matter where they are. FashionsDen makes it easy to communicate, negotiate, and manage projects in your preferred language, with built-in tools that keep everything clear and aligned. Because building a global brand shouldn't be limited by language.

2.title: Built to Support Your Growth
2.desc: FashionsDen gives you the tools, network, and infrastructure to move forward with confidence at every stage. From finding the right partners to managing production and scaling your operations, everything is designed to help you grow faster — without the usual complexity. Because building a fashion brand should feel structured, not overwhelming.

1.name: PRO
1.desc: The preferred option for established supply chain partners.

2.name: ELITE
2.desc: Premium experience for larger companies ready to scale.

Sustainability.title: Sustainability Policy
Sustainability.intro: At FashionsDen, sustainability is not just a buzzword — it's at the core of everything we do. Our sustainability policy guides every decision we make and every partner we work with.
Sustainability.intro2: We are committed to transforming the fashion industry towards a more responsible, ethical and environmentally friendly model.
Sustainability.pillarsSubtitle: These are the fundamental principles that guide our commitment to sustainability.

0.title: Ethical Production
0.desc: We work exclusively with manufacturers who meet ethical production standards, ensuring fair labor conditions.

1.title: Circular Economy
1.desc: We promote circular economy practices, from design to end-of-life of the product.

2.title: Footprint Reduction
2.desc: We encourage local production to reduce the carbon footprint of transportation.

3.title: Sustainable Materials
3.desc: We incentivize the use of organic, recycled and low environmental impact materials.

4.title: Total Transparency
4.desc: We demand transparency throughout the supply chain of our partners.

5.title: Responsible Community
5.desc: We build a community of brands and manufacturers committed to change.

Sustainability.commitmentText: We are committed to rigorously verifying every manufacturer on our platform, ensuring they meet our sustainability standards. We only work with partners who share our vision of a more responsible fashion industry.
Sustainability.ctaTitle: Want To Learn More About Our Policy?

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By accessing and using FashionsDen ("the Platform"), you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree, do not use the Platform. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.text: FashionsDen is a B2B platform connecting fashion brands with manufacturers. We facilitate posting requests for quotation (RFQ), managing proposals, contracts and communication between parties. We are not a party to commercial transactions between brands and manufacturers.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.text: You must provide truthful information and keep it updated. You are responsible for the security of your account and password. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use. We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms.

payments.title: 4. Payments and Subscriptions
payments.text: Some features require a paid subscription processed through Stripe. Prices are displayed in the indicated currency and may be subject to taxes. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled before the next billing period. No refunds are issued for partial periods.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.text: All Platform content (design, code, logos, text) is owned by FashionsDen or its licensors. Users retain rights to content they publish but grant FashionsDen a license to display it within the Platform. Copying, modifying or distributing Platform content without authorization is prohibited.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: FashionsDen acts as a technology intermediary. We do not guarantee the quality, compliance or legality of products or services offered by users. We are not responsible for disputes between brands and manufacturers. Our maximum liability is limited to the amount paid by the user in the last 12 months.

termination.title: 7. Termination
termination.text: You can cancel your account at any time from settings. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, with or without prior notice. After termination, your data will be retained according to our Privacy Policy.

changes.title: 8. Modifications
changes.text: We may update these Terms periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through a notice on the Platform. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.text: For inquiries about these Terms, contact us at legal@fashionsden.com or through our contact form.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.text: We collect information you provide directly: name, email, company data, payment information (processed by Stripe). We also automatically collect usage data: IP address, browser type, pages visited and session cookies.

usage.title: 2. Use of Information
usage.text: We use your information to: operate and improve the Platform, process transactions and subscriptions, send transactional communications (verification, password reset), connect brands with manufacturers, comply with legal obligations and prevent fraud or misuse.

sharing.title: 3. Sharing Information
sharing.text: We do not sell your personal information. We share data with: other Platform users as necessary for B2B transactions, service providers (Stripe for payments, Resend for emails), authorities when required by law. International transfers are protected with standard contractual clauses.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.text: We use essential cookies for Platform operation (authentication, language preferences). We do not use third-party advertising tracking cookies. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, but some features may not be available.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.text: We retain your information while your account is active. After account deletion, we retain data necessary for legal obligations for the legally required period (generally 5 years for financial records). Anonymized data may be kept indefinitely for statistical purposes.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.text: You have the right to: access your personal data, rectify inaccurate information, request deletion of your data, object to processing, request data portability and withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact privacy@fashionsden.com. We will respond within 30 days.

security.title: 7. Security
security.text: We implement technical and organizational security measures: password encryption with bcrypt, HTTPS connections, JWT tokens with expiration, security headers (CSP, HSTS), rate limiting to prevent abuse. However, no system is 100% secure and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

changes.title: 8. Changes to this Policy
changes.text: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via email. The last updated date is indicated at the beginning of the document.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.text: For privacy inquiries: privacy@fashionsden.com. Data Protection Officer: dpo@fashionsden.com. You may also file a complaint with your country's data protection authority.

Help.title: How can we help you?
Help.subtitle: Search our FAQ or contact us

0.question: How can I make a booking?
0.answer: Go to the 'Search Services' section, select the one you need, choose the date and time, and confirm your booking. You will receive a confirmation email.

1.question: Can I cancel my booking?
1.answer: Yes, you can cancel up to 4 hours before the service at no cost. Later cancellations may incur a 30% charge of the service value.

2.question: What happens if the professional doesn't show up?
2.answer: In case of a professional no-show, we will contact you immediately to assign another professional or reschedule at no additional cost. You will also receive a discount on your next service.

3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
3.answer: We accept cash, credit/debit card, bank transfer, Nequi, and Daviplata. Payment is made once the service is completed.

4.question: How do I apply a discount code?
4.answer: When confirming your booking, you will find a field to enter your promo code. The discount will be automatically applied to the total.

5.question: Are the professionals verified?
5.answer: All our professionals go through a verification process that includes identity validation, background checks, and professional certifications. Only verified professionals appear on the platform.

6.question: Is there a service guarantee?
6.answer: Yes, all services come with a satisfaction guarantee. If you are not satisfied, you can request a free review within 48 hours of the service.

7.question: How do I change my password?
7.answer: Go to Settings > Security and you can change your password. You will need to enter your current password and the new password twice to confirm.
